free_text: Alpha-induced reaction cross section measurements on
Target prepared by vacuum evaporation from Eu2O3
powder enriched to 99.2% in 151Eu onto 0.002 mm
Targets were irradiated with alpha beam of 2 uA in the
energy range of 11.5-17.5 MeV for 5 to 24 h.
Intensity of beam current was recorded in time.
Quadratic sum of the beam energy uncertainty
(0.3%) and half of the energy loss in the target in
Quadrature sum of independent relative errors
TS: SAMPLE coded information is included.
Average of two cross sections at same energy
Average of two cross sections at same energy
